title: Tea Master
description:
You stumble into a dimly lit shack and find yourself immersed in a very peaceful space containing an obsessive variety of tea.

The man inside gestures to a selection of [green]teas[/green], each neatly labeled with a [gold]premium price[/gold].

options.title: Bone Tea
options.description: Pay [red]50[/red] [gold]Gold[/gold]. At the start of the next combat, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] your starting hand.

options.title: Ember Tea
options.description: Pay [red]150[/red] [gold]Gold[/gold]. At the start of the next [blue]5[/blue] combats, gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].

options.title: Tea of Discourtesy
options.description: At the start of the next combat, shuffle [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Dazed[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].

notes: The three tea options provide special relics with different passive effects. [gold]Bone Tea[/gold] and [gold]Ember Tea[/gold] require gold and provide beneficial effects for future combats. [gold]Tea of Discourtesy[/gold] is free but afflicts your next combat with Dazed cards.
